---
title: "About"
image: "BenPicture2.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/bmlee22
---

This blog is a record of the skills and techniques used in a Data Visualization class taken in 2026 by Ben Lee.
